name: Hermes Ops Admin
description: Scope for the ops-admin Hermes profile: read project/task/CRM company-wide, create project/task/lead/quotation draft, submit AI Approval Requests. No delete, no financial submit (mục 6.1).

name: Hermes Staff
description: Scope for the staff-work Hermes profile: read/update only the current user's own tasks and permitted projects (mục 6.2).

name: Hermes Sales
description: Scope for the sales-crm Hermes profile: leads/opportunities assigned to the user, quotation drafts, no HR data (mục 6.3).

name: Hermes Director
description: L1 — giám đốc công ty. Real human, dashboard access. Scoped to their own Company via a User Permission row (not this fixture — created per-person at provisioning time). Sees/assigns Project+Task company-wide within that Company.

name: Hermes Team Lead
description: L2 — trưởng nhóm. Real human, dashboard access. Scoped to their own Department via a User Permission row (not this fixture — created per-person at provisioning time). Assigns Task to L3 staff within that Department.
